response:
To speed up the registration of a medicinal product in Russia and reduce the time and costs of conducting bioequivalence studies, we offer to conduct an international clinical trial that includes Russia as an additional site for patient recruitment. For this, we will need the following from your team:  

1. Access to the full clinical trial protocol currently being used in a specific country, so we can align our methodologies and ensure consistency in data collection and analysis.  
2. Results and data from the bioequivalence studies conducted with participants in that country, which will serve as a crucial benchmark for our integrated analysis.  

Based on the combined data, we will prepare a summary report on the clinical trial for registration in Russia.
